build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && npm run tauri:prepare

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https: wss: https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co http://127.0.0.1:4000 http://localhost:4000 http://127.0.0.1:1420 http://localhost:1420; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';
